creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
(In reply to Tijl Coosemans from comment #16)

Without make.conf and USE_AUTOTOOLS=aclocal the port searches for automake 1.14! On CURRENT/ports tree most recent, I'm unable to reproduce Koop Maast's positive report of compilation.

I consider now USE_AUTOTOOLS=aclocal as a required tag. The port compiles with that tag set successfully. there is only one bug in one test only shwoing up on FreeBSD and needs to be dealt with.
